summary: Forward Deployed Engineer with 5+ years shipping agentic AI systems and full-stack products at scale. Collaborate directly with enterprise customers to scope requirements and deploy end-to-end solutions—autonomous agents, backend systems, and private cloud infrastructure. Built production AI platforms serving 50,000+ users with expertise in LLM integration, RAG pipelines, and rapid experimentation across the product lifecycle.

bullet_overrides.24h-evolving-code: Designed and shipped a self-evolving agentic code system (generator/evaluator loop) that accelerated development velocity; implemented CI/CD automation with GitHub Actions to close iteration cycles in under 24 hours.
bullet_overrides.24h-aws-infra: Delivered end-to-end multi-tenant cloud infrastructure for enterprise customers, reducing provisioning costs by 50% through automated resource management and tenant isolation across AWS services.
bullet_overrides.mdt-platform: Led end-to-end product development and launched a production platform that increased doctor-patient engagement by 30%; built and deployed chatbot agents in collaboration with stakeholders to automate patient workflows.
